description: Call GET /api/v1/google/ai-overview for Google SERP Ai Overview through Just Serp API with url.

operations.description: Get Google aI Overview data, including generated summaries and cited sources, for generative search visibility tracking.

parameters.description: The unique URL generated by Google to access the AI Overview. This URL is typically extracted from the 'ai_overview_url' field in a Google Search API response. Note: This URL is transient and usually expires within 2 minutes.
parameters.name: url

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
